docket_entries.description: AMENDED PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA (FORFEITURE)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2,896.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO ATTY GUADALUPE GAMINO ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANTS ERMELINDA LOPEZ AND CHRISTINO FLORES. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2,896.00 US CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT, IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PUR TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES & BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489. - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
